summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX Banking Application before redeployment. Backend: 94.7% pass rate (18/19 tests). Frontend: 59.3% pass rate (16/27 tests). Critical features working: Admin panel, KYC review with document download fix, support tickets with message deletion, transfers queue. Several UI/UX features need attention.

minor_bugs.issue: KYC Document Placeholder SVG missing exact explanation text expected by test
minor_bugs.impact: Very minor - placeholder is working, just text wording is slightly different

ui_bugs.issue: Language toggle button exists but doesn't appear to change language properly
Logout button not easily accessible from main dashboard
Notification bell exists but panel doesn't open on click
Tax hold and notes filters not found in users list
Mobile menu not detected in mobile viewport (390x844)

integration_issues.issue: Edit rejection reason button not found in rejected transfers details
Delete transfer button not found in transfer details
'ECOMMBX Staff' text not found in transfers - may be showing admin name instead

passed_tests: Backend: User Registration with Plain Password
Backend: Admin User Details Password Field
Backend: Admin Users List - Tax Hold & Notes Fields
Frontend: Ticket Status Change Buttons (In Progress, Resolved, Closed)
Frontend: Delete Ticket Message Button (Admin) - NEW FEATURE ✓
Frontend: KYC Document Download Button - FIXED ✓

critical_fixes_required: Admin notification bell panel not opening - HIGH PRIORITY
Edit rejection reason button not accessible in transfers - HIGH PRIORITY
Delete transfer button not accessible in transfer details - HIGH PRIORITY
medium_priority_fixes: Language toggle (EN/IT) not changing language properly
Logout button not easily accessible from dashboard
Admin user filters (tax hold, notes) not found in users list
'ECOMMBX Staff' text not displaying correctly in transfers (may show admin name)
Mobile bottom navigation not detected in mobile viewport
low_priority_fixes: KYC document placeholder SVG text wording slightly different than expected
features_confirmed_working: ✓ Support tickets with NEW delete message feature
✓ KYC review with FIXED document download
✓ Ticket status changes (In Progress, Resolved, Closed)
✓ Admin user management with password field
features_not_fully_tested: Password visibility toggle on login/signup pages (couldn't access login page during test - already logged in)
Invalid login error handling with email retention
